name: Suzy's Favorite Zucchini Pickles
recipeInstructions:
Prep time: 10-15 minutes. Cook time: 35 minutes.
1. Wash the zucchini and trim the ends. Cut into approximately 1 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Combine vinegar, sugar, cinnamon sticks, and whole cloves in a saucepan. Bring to a boil and simmer for 10 minutes to make a syrup.
3. Add the cubed zucchini to the boiling syrup. Cook gently for no more than 10 minutes.
4. Using a slotted spoon, remove the zucchini cubes from the pot and transfer them to clean jars.
5. Allow the mixture to cool slightly before pouring it over the zucchini in the jar. Seal the jar tightly and refrigerate.
Will keep in the refrigerator for several weeks or more.
